title: broadcast() clones full payload Vec<u8> for every recipient
description: state.rs broadcast() clones RelayMessage (which contains payload: Vec<u8>) once per connected client. With N clients and 1 MiB payloads, each broadcast allocates N MiB. With 100 clients this is 100 MiB per message. The fix is Arc<Vec<u8>> or Arc<[u8]> for payload fields in Deliver and Broadcast, reducing clones to reference count increments. Not a current problem at Phase 1 scale but becomes visible at ~50+ clients with large MLS-padded messages (padding_size(100) adds 100 bytes per message, not a large factor, but future MLS ciphertext with group ratchet overhead can be significant).
